title: notholithocarpus densiflorus var. densiflorus
intro: Notholithocarpus densiflorus var. densiflorus, commonly known as the Santa Cruz cypress, is a variety of coniferous evergreen shrub or tree native to the western coast of North America. The medicinal properties of Notholithocarpus densiflorus var. densiflorus are derived from its cones, which have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and boost the immune system. Notholithocarpus densiflorus var. densiflorus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile remedy for a range of ailments.
